text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: You know, something to lift the spirits.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've been lacking sufficient stimulation in my
everyday routine. I feel like my brain cells are
about to begin dying off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Even coming up to this rooftop to observe the
activities of Umamusume has failed to get me
going...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... It would be interesting, maybe, if
someone like... tripled in size or something...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon seems to be suffering from the
boredom of a humdrum life.
